title: MoQT Codec Test Vector File
description: A collection of codec test vectors pairing hex-encoded wire bytes with expected decoded representations or errors.

message_type.description: The message type or codec unit being tested (e.g., 'varint', 'subscribe', 'client_setup').

message_type_id.description: Hex-encoded message type ID from the wire format (e.g., '0x03' for SUBSCRIBE).

spec_section.description: Reference to the specification section defining this message type (e.g., '9.7').

id.description: Unique identifier within the file. Kebab-case.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this case tests.

hex.description: Lowercase hex-encoded wire bytes. No 0x prefix, no separators.

decoded.description: Expected decoded representation as a plain JSON object.

canonical.description: Defaults to true. Set to false for valid-but-non-canonical encodings (decode-only test).

error_detail.description: Optional human-readable detail about the expected failure.
